name: @memohai/desktop
description: Memoh Electron desktop application (self-managed bootstrap reusing @memohai/web components)
author: Memoh

scripts.build: pnpm run prepare:local-server && electron-vite build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.build:dir: pnpm run prepare:local-server && electron-vite build && electron-builder --dir --publish never
scripts.build:unpack: pnpm run prepare:local-server && electron-vite build && electron-builder --dir --publish never
scripts.build:mac: pnpm run prepare:local-server && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.build:linux: pnpm run prepare:local-server && electron-vite build && electron-builder --linux --publish never
scripts.build:win: pnpm run prepare:local-server && electron-vite build && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:node && pnpm run typecheck:web
